title: oldenlandia setifera
intro: Oldenlandia setifera, also known as setifera or Chinese crested grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia setifera are said to include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and promoting digestive health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In traditional herbal preparations, Oldenlandia setifera is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used in herbal capsules or tablets.
